name: Tu Vo-Thanh
tagline: Software Developer | ML Enthusiast | Open Source Contributor
bio: My short-term goal is to contribute to creating efficient and user-friendly tools that provide valuable assistance to students and faculty. In the long term, I aim to work in AI DevOps positions, where I can combine my technical skills with a deep understanding of AI infrastructure, deployment, and optimization.

education.field: Computer Vision Major, High-Quality Program in Information Technology

roles.title: Vice President
roles.description: Tracked all events organized by SAB. Led, guided, directed, and evaluated the work of Heads of Department. Ensured a healthy working environment for about 70 members.

roles.title: Technical Lead
roles.description: Managed Technician Team, responsible for livestream in events and IT systems. Maintained communication and working tools of SAB (Discord server and bots).

roles.title: Event Operator of Academy
roles.description: Joined cs101 event operation and content team — a series of workshops introducing tools that IT students should know.

roles.title: Event Operator
roles.description: Organized and operated developer community events.

roles.title: Vice President
roles.description: Developed online training procedures for 8 contestants and 8 trainers. Directed a 15-member operation team of offline Olympia simulation contests. Organized and trained the Technical Team.
